text: AAPL Q4 EPS $2.18 beats $2.10 consensus; iPhone revenue +6% YoY.
TSLA cuts FY guidance citing softer demand in China; delays Cybertruck high-volume ramp to H2.
FDA issues Complete Response Letter to BIIB on lecanemab follow-on indication; requires additional Phase 3.
Microsoft to acquire Activision Blizzard for $68.7B all-cash; expected close FY2024.
Fed signals two more 25bp hikes; CRE pressure across regional banks deepens into 2026.
NVDA launches new H300 inference chip with 3x perf-per-watt over H100; preorders sold out for Q3.
OXY CEO Vicki Hollub to step down at year end; board names interim CFO as acting CEO during search.
GME short interest down 12% over the past two weeks; community posts on r/wallstreetbets show conviction-holders accumulating.
Severe thunderstorms expected across the Midwest this weekend; flash flood warnings in effect for several counties.
META beats Q2 EPS but issues weak Q3 ad guidance; ARPU softer in EU on Reality Labs cost overhang.
